title: Second headset connected with the mobile app
scenario: Second headset connected to Poly Studio Mobile app appears correctly on Inventory, Device User, Mobile Profile, and Device Profile pages with accurate data when first headset is already registered on Lens tenant
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure the first headset is already connected and registered on the Lens tenant.
3. Navigate to the Device Settings screen for the first headset and confirm it appears in the app.
4. Power on and pair a second headset with the mobile device via Bluetooth.
5. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and allow it to detect and connect to the second headset.
6. Navigate to the Inventory page (or equivalent device list) in the app.
7. Verify the second headset appears on the Inventory page with correct data: name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
8. Navigate to the Device User / Mobile User page and verify the second headset is listed with accurate information.
9. Navigate to the Mobile Profile page and verify the second headset's profile data is correct.
10. Navigate to the Device Profile page and verify the second headset's details (name, version, private IP, status, serial number, date) are accurate.
expected: The second headset appears correctly on the Inventory page, Device User/Mobile User page, Mobile Profile page, and Device Profile page with accurate data including name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
